{{Quote|Take my troopers, Rbann... and capture one of the Freelies!|Blackhole|<ref name="world" />}}
'''Rbann''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who worked directly for [[Cronal|Blackhole]], the shadowy [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Blackhole dispatched Rbann to the "Gambler's World" of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], ordering the Kubaz to track prominent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who Blackhole had learned had been sent to Vorzyd V to disrupt Imperial operations there. Rbann quickly managed to track them to the [[Casino Royale]] in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]], and his [[Shadow stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] overpowered the Rebels and imprisoned them aboard Rbann's [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="world" />

However, Skywalker and Organa managed to escape with the help of their [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. Soon afterward, Blackhole learned that Organa had been kidnapped for ransom by a delinquent youth gang known as the [[Freelies]], and tasked Rbann to capture one of the gang's number so they could extract Organa's location. Rbann managed to track down a Freelie named [[Bemmie]], but Blackhole's efforts to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] the young [[Vorzydiak]] were foiled when Skywalker arrived and freed their captive.<ref name="world" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rbann made his first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in ''[[Gambler's World]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written and illustrated by [[Russ Manning]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="world" />
